title: Skill
description: Schema for a y2 agent skill definition modeled on Palantir Foundry ontology primitives.

name.description: Kebab-case slug — singular noun for object/interface types, verb-phrase for actions. Must match directory name.

displayName.description: Human-readable label. Auto-derived from name if omitted.

description.description: Self-documenting one-liner. Include key verbs (run, build, test, screenshot) for claude-code auto-load matching.

type.description: Ontological primitive. 'action' = a business operation; 'object' = a domain entity; 'interface' = a shared capability contract; 'skill' = general-purpose agent capability (default).

implements.description: Interface skill slugs this skill conforms to (like Palantir interface implementation).

extends.description: Interface slugs this interface extends (interface type only).

parameters.description: Typed inputs for action-type skills. Model as Palantir action parameters.

modifies.description: Object-type slugs or system names that this action modifies. Documents side-effects.

links.description: Named relationships to other skills (like Palantir link types with forward/reverse names).

forwardName.description: Relationship name read from this skill (e.g. 'requires', 'complements').

reverseName.description: Relationship name read from target skill.

properties.description: Domain properties for object-type skills (like Palantir object type properties).

sharedCapabilities.description: For interface-type skills: list of capability names that implementors must provide.

hidden.description: Mark true for technical/infrastructure skills with no direct domain value. Palantir 'hidden' object type equivalent.
